allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$(cat <<''EOF''
Initial commit: The World Without Lifts

A scroll-driven narrative web experience exploring counterfactual history.

Features:
- Interactive elevator experiences with scroll-locking transitions
- 3D cityscape morphing animation using Three.js
- Smooth scroll with Lenis and GSAP animations
- Light/dark theme transitions between real world and dystopian sections
- Lazy-loaded sections for performance optimization
- Immediate display for final sections after return journey

Tech stack:
- React 18 + Vite
- Tailwind CSS 3
- GSAP + ScrollTrigger
- React Three Fiber + Three.js
- Lenis smooth scroll

Content refinements:
- Natural punctuation throughout narrative text
- Consistent tone and coherent storytelling
EOF
)")
